#1 BENSON/PADILLA. C/C FOR SETTL CONF. ATTY C SALVAGIONE APP FOR PLTF. DEFT J BARR PRESENT IN PRO PER. DEFT N BARR NOT PRESENT - HER JURY DEMAND IS STRICKEN. SETTLED ON RECORD AS TO J BARR. JDMT BY STIP FOR PLTF AGAINST DEFT. PLTF TO PREPARE STIP TO BE SIGNED BY N BARR ALSO. TRIAL DATE STANDS. DEPT 7/JUDGE TOMAR MASON/REPORTER:MARILYN NORMAN/CLERK:G. SHULL. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL ON DEFT NICOLE BARR. ATNY CAROL SALVAGIONE, ASSOC OF SUSAN BREED, PRESENT FOR PLTF. DEFT NICOLE BARR DOES NOT APPEAR. PLTF PRESENTS PRIMA FACIE CASE. COURT ORDERS JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFT AND IN FAVOR OF PLTF FOR RESTITN & POSS OF PREMISES, BACK RENT & DAMAGES, COSTS & FORF OF LEASE AGREEMT. PLTF TO PROPARE SINGLE JUDGMNT THAT DETAILS SETTLEMENT AS TO DEFT JOHN BARR AND DEFAULT AS TO NOCOLE BARR.
MEMORANDUM OF COSTS AND DISBURSEMENTS, $140.00 TOTAL COSTS, MATURE DATE NOV-14-1995, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DENYS, JOSEPH

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARR, JOHN BARR, NICOLE JUDGMENT ORDERED AS TO DEFT NICOLE BARR AFTER FAILURE TO APP AT TRIAL ON 10/23/95: JUDGMNT FOR PLTF AND AGAINST DEFT NICOLE BARR FOR RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF PREMISES OF 210 ROSE STREET; BACK RENT AND DAMAGES OF $1742.89; COSTS OF $140.00; AND FORFEITURE OF LEASE AGREEMENT. JUDGMNT ORDERED AS TO DEFT JOHN BARR AS PER SETTLEMENT OF 10/16/95: JUDGMNT FOR PLTF AND AGAINST DEFT JOHN BARR FOR RESTITN & POSSESSION OF PREMISES. WRIT MAY ISSUE, BUT ANY EXECUTION STAYED TO 10-31-95 AT 11:59PM. JUDGMNT ALSO FOR BACK RENT/DAMAGES IN AMT OF $1066.00 IN PAYMENTS (SEE SETTL AGREEMENT FOR DETAILS); LEASE FORFEITED. NO FURTHER STAYS UNLESS PROOF OF MEDICAL EMERGENCY; OCTOBER '95 RENT WAIVED BY PLTF AS WELL AS PLTF'S ATNYS FEES & COSTS IF DEFT VACATES TIMELY. IF DFT VACATES & COMPLETES PAYMENTS, PLTF WILL DISMISS ACTION AS TO JOHN BARR.
